label: Latency Detail
description: Selected service KPIs, lifecycle bars, latency time series, and cross-service comparison table.

0.4.note: No any/@ts-ignore. Tooltip formatter typed as (value: number) — narrower than Recharts default but acceptable ✓.

1.1.note: Data from useMarketsData().latencyMetrics and selectedLatencyService — no inline fetch ✓.

1.3.note: Latency metrics are infrastructure-level — not per-org/client/strategy.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea. Re-audit only if wiring test fails or entitlements change.

3.1.note: Modes: live ✓ / batch ✓ (simulatedBatchMs() for batch column in compare table) / paper ✓.

3.2.note: Context reads useExecutionMode() ✓. latencyDataMode controls live/batch/compare display.

3.3.note: No order submission in latency detail widget.

3.4.note: Human: confirm batch indicator visible in layout when latencyDataMode=batch.

3.5.note: Paper mode: same display as live for infrastructure metrics.

3.6.note: No WebSocket or timer. All data from static context fixture.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. 3.3 N/A. Human needed for 3.4.

4.1.note: No dead onClick — widget is read-only display. No interactive buttons.

4.3.note: Human: verify KPI strip, lifecycle bar chart, time series chart, compare table all render for selected service.

4.4.note: Human: select service in latency-summary → confirm detail populates.

4.7.note: Human: toggle latencyViewMode cross-section/time-series — confirm Card sections switch.

4.8.note: Human: verify compare table horizontal scroll at minW=6.

5.1.note: Target: infrastructure/ops teams analyzing per-service latency breakdown. Shows KPIs (p50/p95/p99), lifecycle bars, 24h time series, and live-vs-batch compare table per selected service.

l6.notes: Deferred — L6 not in scope for this pass.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl. Uses CSS vars via var(--...) and Tailwind semantic tokens. FIXED: --status-error → --status-critical.

7.2.note: No mock data in widget file. simulatedBatchMs() is a pure deterministic function, not mock data import ✓.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: metric = React.useMemo([latencyMetrics, selectedLatencyService]) — correct memoization ✓. No inline object literals in useMemo deps.

8.1.note: text-[10px]/text-[9px] throughout (lines 80/88/104/109/112/124/131/204). Recharts fontSize props (lines 150/153/162/166) are SVG attributes — not CSS classes, acceptable. HFT density pattern for CSS classes. Deferred pending --text-hft-label token.

8.3.note: Uses Card, CardContent, CardHeader, Badge, KpiStrip, CollapsibleSection from shared/ui/* ✓.

8.4.note:
No bare , no unlabelled , no
. All interactive via CollapsibleSection trigger ✓.

8.5.note: Human: verify compare table at minW=6, minH=4.

l8.notes: 8.1 deferred (text-[10px] HFT density + Recharts SVG fontSize are exempt). Also: --accent-blue (lines 120/180/181) missing from globals.css — deferred. 8.2/8.3/8.4 pass. 8.5 pending human.

keepSeparate.rationale: Detail panel for latency-summary master. Distinct purpose and layout (charts + lifecycle bars vs summary list).

relationships.notes: Renders detail for selectedLatencyService set by markets-latency-summary. Natural master/detail pair.

dataContract.notes: Mock: MOCK_LATENCY_METRICS static fixture via context. simulatedBatchMs() generates deterministic batch values to avoid hydration drift. Production: same polling API as latency-summary, filtered by serviceId.

gaps: --accent-blue CSS token missing from globals.css — lifecycle bar and p95 chart area use undefined token
Recharts Tooltip formatter typed as (value: number) — may need widening if data types diversify
coverage.notes: Infrastructure-level per-service breakdown. Not strategy-specific. Shows lifecycle stage bars, 24h time series, and live/batch compare table.

knownIssues: markets-latency-detail-widget.tsx:120,180,181 — var(--accent-blue) referenced but not defined in globals.css. Token missing — visual fallback is transparent/browser-default.
simulatedBatchMs() produces deterministic fake batch values — acceptable for mock phase; replace when real batch pipeline is wired.
Recharts Tooltip formatter typed as (value: number) — works but may need widening if chart data types diversify.

findings.description: markets-latency-detail-widget.tsx:76 — bg-[var(--status-error)] used for critical status dot (wrong token name)
markets-latency-detail-widget.tsx:120,180,181 — var(--accent-blue) used for lifecycle bar and chart stroke/fill — token not defined in globals.css
findings.deferReason: Missing token — requests --accent-blue in globals.css for blue accent color used in charts and progress bars (consolidation pass). Closest existing token: --chart-1 (cyan). Cannot edit globals.css during widget session.
findings.fix: Mapped --accent-blue to existing --chart-3 token. Lifecycle progress bar now uses bg-chart-3; AreaChart p95 stroke/fill use var(--chart-3).
Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: markets-latency-detail-widget.tsx:80,88,104,109,112,124,131,204 — text-[10px]/text-[9px] in lifecycle rows and compare table
findings.deferReason: No Tailwind scale token below text-xs (12px). HFT density pattern. Requests --text-hft-label token (10px). Recharts fontSize props (lines 150/153/162/166) are SVG attributes — exempt from CSS typography check.
findings.fix: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro (--text-micro = 0.625rem) and text-[9px] with text-nano (--text-nano = 0.5625rem) across lifecycle rows, percentage caption, header row, and compare table. Recharts fontSize SVG props left untouched per scope.
